creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to jan from comment #8)
I cannot reproduce the crash with any version of clang that I have access to. I tried from the very first version on the upstream 11.x branch (llvmorg-11-init-00000-g5852475e2c0) to roughly the start of 12.x, but none of them resulted in any assertion or crash with this test case.
